target.title: feat(diagnostics): trace secret preparation timing
target.body:
## Summary
- rewrites the broad secrets diagnostics PR into a narrow startup diagnostics slice
- emits sanitized `secrets.prepare` diagnostics timeline spans with only low-cardinality activation/reason/auth-surface metadata
- suppresses startup secret error messages on enclosing diagnostics timeline spans so secret-provider failures do not leak sensitive text into exported diagnostics
- adds focused tests and an unreleased changelog entry crediting @samzong

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- remote proof attempted but blocked before test execution: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm test:serial src/gateway/server-startup-config.secrets.test.ts src/infra/diagnostics-timeline.test.ts"` failed because Blacksmith is not authenticated
- direct AWS Crabbox fallback attempted but blocked before test execution: `../crabbox/bin/crabbox run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm test:serial src/gateway/server-startup-config.secrets.test.ts src/infra/diagnostics-timeline.test.ts"` failed because AWS credentials/IMDS role are unavailable

Behavior addressed: Gateway startup can spend meaningful time preparing runtime secrets, but operators lacked a sanitized timing signal that distinguished this path without exposing secret material or provider-specific values.
Real environment tested: not completed; both permitted remote runners are blocked before command execution in this environment.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; autoreview command listed above; remote Crabbox/Testbox commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: focused regression coverage is included in `src/gateway/server-startup-config.secrets.test.ts` and `src/infra/diagnostics-timeline.test.ts`; autoreview is clean.
Observed result after fix: static diff check and autoreview pass; remote runtime proof is blocked by runner auth/credentials.
What was not tested: the focused Vitest files and `pnpm check:changed` were not run because local testing is disallowed for this task and remote runners are unavailable.
target.author: samzong
